item.title: Oh I agree, I love old houses like this, my parents house was like this until my dad fully insulated...
item.description:
Oh I agree, I love old houses like this, my parents house was like this until my dad fully insulated it, and now it's stuffy and you sneeze a lot
Breathing houses are great!
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 33 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 8465
